# VirelioCreator

> AI-powered website generator that finds businesses on Google Maps and automatically creates professional, custom websites.

## About

VirelioCreator is a SaaS tool that scans Google Maps for businesses, extracts their data (name, address, reviews, photos), and uses AI to generate a complete, professional website tailored to each business. The entire process is automatic — no manual input required.

## Key Features

- Automatic business discovery via Google Maps
- AI-generated copy tailored to each business
- Brand color detection and consistent design
- Google Reviews integration
- Mobile-responsive templates
- SEO-optimized from day one
- Custom domain support
- 24-hour delivery

## How It Works

1. **Scan** — We search Google Maps and find the business. Name, address, reviews, and photos are collected automatically.
2. **Design** — AI analyzes the brand, selects the right template, and generates a complete website with matching colors, reviews, and photos.
3. **Launch** — A preview link is delivered. Once approved, the website goes live with a custom domain.

## Pricing

- **Starter** (Free) — Preview website, 1 template
- **Professional** (€29/month) — Custom domain, all templates, SEO optimization
- **Enterprise** (Custom) — Multiple locations, API access, priority support

## Contact

- Website: https://creator.virelio.nl
- Email: Available via contact form on the website

## Technical

- Built with: HTML, Tailwind CSS, Three.js
- Hosting: GitHub Pages
- Languages: Dutch (primary), English
